results.title: Man Utd news: Sandro Tonali 'put up for sale' as contact made over exciting transfer
results.description: Manchester United have made Newcastle's Sandro Tonali a top transfer target.

results.title: IPL 2026: Preity Zinta’s tense chat with Shreyas Iyer, Ponting’s dejected dugout look sum up PBKS collapse
results.description: Punjab Kings suffered their sixth consecutive loss in IPL 2026 against Royal Challengers Bengaluru. This defeat has severely impacted their playoff chances. Royal Challengers Bengaluru secured a playoff spot with a strong performance. Punjab Kings' captain Shreyas Iyer acknowledged the match was lost early in the powerplay. The team's confidence appears shaken as their early season dominance has vanished.

results.title: Ligue 1 Roundup: Lille Clinch Champions League Spot On Final Day; PSG Suffer Paris FC Defeat
results.description: Ligue 1 2025-26 Matchday 34 Roundup: Lille secured Champions League football despite defeat, PSG ended with a derby loss to Paris FC, Marseille grabbed a place in the Europa League, and Nantes’ season closed in turmoil after a pitch invasion
